title: Wheels Mariënwaerdt
summary: Wheels Mariënwaerdt is the largest car event in the Netherlands, held on the historic Landgoed Mariënwaerdt estate in the beautiful Betuwe region. It is described as one of the most unique weekend escapes in the Netherlands, featuring a range of classic and supercars, award ceremonies, and a book market.
description: This major car event takes place on a historic estate dating back to 1129. The program spans three days, with Saturday featuring the fullest schedule, including the International Concours d'Elegance Award Ceremony at 16:30. Visitors can enjoy Car Talks, a Super Car Paddock, and a Pre-War Sprint that occurs daily. A Book Market is also available. The event is recommended to be planned as a day trip or weekend escape, rather than a casual walk-around. Going by car is recommended, with parking tickets available online.
best_for: Car enthusiasts, families with older children, people interested in classic cars, historic estates, and weekend getaways.
price_range: Adults: 29.5 Eur (early bird 24.5 Eur), Kids (10-17 yo): 12.5 Eur. Parking tickets extra.
highlights: Largest car event in the Netherlands
tips: Plan in advance as a day trip or weekend escape.
Going by car is recommended due to distance from major cities (e.g., Amsterdam - 70km).
Parking is available and tickets can be purchased online.
Early bird tickets offer a discount.
Saturday has the fullest program of events.
